name: [VN-SOC R5] Non-Browser Outbound HTTP/HTTPS
description: Phát hiện outbound TCP (port 80/443/8080/8443) từ process KHÔNG nằm trong whitelist browser + Windows native HTTPS process. Đặc trưng của C2 beacon (Cobalt Strike, Empire, Sliver) — T1071.001 Application Layer Protocol: Web Protocols. powershell.exe, cmd.exe, wscript.exe, mshta.exe hoặc custom binary trong %APPDATA% / %TEMP% gọi HTTPS là chỉ dấu mạnh của Command-and-Control / dropper download payload.
query:
event.code: "3" AND
winlog.provider_name: "Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon" AND
winlog.event_data.DestinationPort: ("80" OR "443" OR "8080" OR "8443") AND
NOT winlog.event_data.Image.keyword: (
  *\chrome.exe OR
  *\msedge.exe OR
  *\firefox.exe OR
  *\iexplore.exe OR
  *\opera.exe OR
  *\brave.exe OR
  *\OneDrive*.exe OR
  *\Microsoft.SharePoint*.exe OR
  *\Teams.exe OR
  *\ms-teams.exe OR
  *\svchost.exe OR
  *\RuntimeBroker.exe OR
  *\WindowsTerminal.exe OR
  *\SearchApp.exe OR
  *\backgroundTaskHost.exe OR
  *\NisSrv.exe OR
  *\MsMpEng.exe OR
  *\smartscreen.exe OR
  *\WUDFHost.exe OR
  *\YourPhone.exe OR
  *\WidgetService.exe OR
  *\HxOutlook.exe OR
  *\HxTsr.exe OR
  *\ApplicationFrameHost.exe OR
  *\CompPkgSrv.exe OR
  *\agy.exe
)
